## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` is clean
- [ ] `pytest -q --cov=src --cov-report=term` passes, including the **92% coverage floor**
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change (and ran the live gate locally for backend changes)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` for any user-facing change
- [ ] Updated README/docs if behavior, tools, env vars, or the organism coverage matrix changed
